intro: Mesosphaerum albipes, also known as white-stemmed false pennyroyal, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Mesosphaerum albipes include essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Mesosphaerum albipes is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat respiratory infections and relieve symptoms of colds and flu.
